Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Jun-16-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq. for Petitioner: Shawn McGuire as Guardian ad litem for: Noreene McGuire, a minor Claimant. Order waiving live testimony is in file.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $8,987.58
Medical Expenses $4,42.60
A net balance of $26,962.64 to be deposited into a blocked account with American West, 1500 Main St., St. Maries, ID. 83861, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
